entries.content: Consciousness is the state of being aware of and able to think about one's existence. It encompasses subjective experience, self-awareness, and the integration of information into a unified experience. Various theories attempt to explain it, from Integrated Information Theory to quantum approaches.

metadata.aspects: Subjective experience (qualia), Self-awareness, Intentionality, Integration of information
metadata.theories: Integrated Information Theory, Global Workspace Theory, Quantum consciousness
metadata.debate: The hard problem of consciousness - how physical processes give rise to subjective experience

entries.content: Quantum mechanics is the fundamental theory describing nature at the smallest scales of energy levels. It reveals a probabilistic reality where particles exist in superposition and can be entangled across distances, challenging our classical intuitions about reality.

metadata.principles: Wave-particle duality, Uncertainty principle, Quantum entanglement, Superposition
metadata.applications: Quantum computing, Quantum cryptography, Laser technology
metadata.implications: Challenges determinism and reveals the probabilistic nature of reality

entries.content: Artificial Intelligence encompasses systems that perform tasks requiring human intelligence. From narrow AI solving specific problems to the theoretical possibility of general AI matching human cognition, AI is transforming how we process information and make decisions.

metadata.types: Narrow AI (task-specific), General AI (human-level), Super AI (beyond human)
metadata.techniques: Machine learning, Deep learning, Natural language processing
metadata.capabilities: Pattern recognition, Decision making, Learning from experience
